title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Gobindpur
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Gobindpur constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Gobindpur
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Gobindpur assembly segment.
